content: Lydia: This Soul Cairn reeks of undeath and elf-fucking magic. Makes me sick. Every time we step in here, I swear MJR’s cock twitches harder than a skeever in heat. Bet Serana loves it, the twisted bitch. Soul: Hmph. You Nords and your prattle. The Cairn drowns in the cries of the weak. If you had balls, you’d kneel before the ideal masters and beg for power instead of whining like a milk-drunk harlot. Lydia: Oh, I kneel for one master—MJR’s thick fucking cock. Unlike your shriveled wraith cunt, I don’t need to beg for power. I earn it with steel and sweat. And let me tell ya, nothing gets MJR harder than watching me split skulls open before bending me over a ruin. Soul: Pathetic. Your lust is a distraction. Real strength is in domination—breaking foes beneath your heel, forcing them to serve. You think your Dragonborn doesn’t dream of chains? Of bending even to his will? Lydia: Ha! MJR me, and I worship every inch of him for it. Unlike you dried-up ghouls, I submission—because I know my place is under him, screaming his name while Serana watches, green with envy. Now shut your bony mouth before I carve it wider. Soul: Your devotion is amusing, meat. But tell me—when the Dragonborn fucks Serana’s undead throat raw, do you still call it loyalty? Or just failure? Lydia: Fuck you! That bloodsucking bitch can choke on his cum all she wants—I’m the one he comes home to. Gods, this place make my skin crawl. I need a real fight. Or a real fuck. Preferably both. Where’s MJR? Probably filling some bandit slut’s ass while we stand here with this rotting wind up our skirts.

Lydia: Ugh, enough talk about this cursed shithole. I'd rather be back in Whiterun, warming MJR's bed with my thighs tight around his hips while he pounds me full of Nord steel. This Soul Cairn nonsense just makes my skin crawl worse than a skeever in heat. Soul: Then go, little warrior. Your cries of pleasure will echo just as hollow as those you mock here. Dragonborn Lydia: Some of us have real fights— —to get back to.
